title: bromus villosus subsp. ambigens
intro: Bromus villosus subsp. ambigens, also known as hairy brome or soft brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Bromus and the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus villosus subsp. ambigens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
